executives.name: Trent Mell
executives.background: Mr. Mell is the founder of Electra and has over 20 years of experience in the mining industry. He has held executive roles at First Quantum Minerals, Sherritt International, and North American Palladium.

tenure_dates.title: President, Chief Executive Officer and Director

executives.name: Peter Johnston
executives.background: Mr. Johnston is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 15 years of financial experience in the mining and manufacturing sectors. He previously served as Corporate Controller for the Company.

executives.name: Mark Trevisiol
executives.background: Mr. Trevisiol has over 30 years of experience in mineral processing and refining. He previously held senior leadership roles at Vale (formerly Inco) and was the CEO of Silver Bullion.

executives.name: Michael Insulan
executives.background: Dr. Insulan has over 20 years of experience in the metals and mining industry, with a focus on battery materials. He previously worked at CRU Group and Eurasian Resources Group.

board_of_directors.name: John Kanellitsas
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Kanellitsas has over 30 years of experience in the investment banking and asset management industries. He is the Executive Vice Chairman of Lithium Americas Corp.

board_of_directors.name: Trent Mell
board_of_directors.background: Founder and CEO of Electra Battery Materials Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Susan Uthayakumar
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Uthayakumar is the Chief Energy and Sustainability Officer at Prologis. She previously held senior executive roles at Schneider Electric.

board_of_directors.name: Beryl Fedoruk
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Fedoruk is a retired partner from KPMG with over 35 years of experience in auditing and advisory services for the mining industry.

board_of_directors.name: Garett Macdonald
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Macdonald is a professional engineer with over 25 years of experience in mine development and operations. He is currently the President and CEO of Maritime Resources Corp.

sources.source_description: Electra Battery Materials Corporation - Leadership Team Website
